ranks.description: Action Points regenerate 15% faster.
Action Points regenerate 30% faster.
Action Points regenerate 45% faster.
On kills, heal 2 HP and reduce how feral you are by 2%.
On kills, heal 4 HP and reduce how feral you are by 3%.
On kills, heal 6 HP and reduce how feral you are by 4%.
On kills, heal 8 HP and reduce how feral you are by 5%.
The power of Glow makes your AP regenerate 15% faster.
The power of Glow makes your AP regenerate 30% faster.
The power of Glow makes your AP regenerate 45% faster.
Gain Limb Damage Reduction based on your END.
Gain +10% damage per kill while on a Kill Streak (Max 10).
The positive effects of pre-war alcohol last twice as long.
Produce 50% more ammo when crafting.
Produce 75% more ammo when crafting.
Produce 100% more ammo when crafting.
Produce 150% more ammo when crafting.
Produce 40% more rounds when crafting ammunition.
Produce 80% more rounds when crafting ammunition.
Aim your gun at an Animal for a 25% chance to pacify it.
Aim your gun at an Animal for a 50% chance to pacify it.
Aim your gun at an Animal for a 75% chance to pacify it.
Your disease cures have a 50% chance to cure a disease on nearby teammates.
Your disease cures always cure a disease from nearby teammates too.
You no longer take Rad damage from swimming and can breathe underwater.
Your crafted armor has improved durability and costs fewer materials.
Your weapons weigh 50% less.
Your weapons weigh 75% less.
Your arms allow you to handle ranged weapons better, increasing accuracy by 15%.
Your arms allow you to handle ranged weapons better, increasing accuracy by 30%.
Gain more VATS accuracy based on your PER.
Ballistic weapon ammo weighs 45% less.
Ballistic weapon ammo weighs 90% less.
Gain Damage Resistance based on your STR. Doubled when not wearing armor.
Gun bashing does +25% damage and +35% limb damage.
Gun bashing does +50% damage and +75% limb damage.
Energy weapon ammo weighs 45% less.
Energy weapon ammo weighs 90% less.
Gain 2 HP per second while in combat.
Gain 4 HP per second while in combat.
Each stack of Bullet Storm increases your bash damage by 5%.
V.A.T.S. criticals now do +50% damage.
V.A.T.S. criticals now do +75% damage.
V.A.T.S. criticals now do +100% damage.
Block 15% more damage from your opponents' melee attacks.
Block 20% more damage from your opponents' melee attacks.
Block 25% more damage from your opponents' melee attacks.
Your bleed effects have 35% more damage and 25% less duration.
When you die, teammates gain +40 DR and heal 70 HP/sec for 10s.
Teammates gain +40 DR and heal 70 HP/sec for 20s.
Teammates gain +40 DR and heal 70 HP/sec for 30s.
Teammates gain +40 DR and heal 70 HP/sec for 40s.
Bloodpacks and Cannibal now satisfy thirst, no longer irradiate, and heal twice as much.
Bleeding enemies you kill have a chance to explode based on your LCK.
Gain Damage & Energy Resistance based on your CHA and number of teammates.
Expending Glow makes your thrown grenades deal +20% damage.
Expending Glow makes your thrown grenades deal +35% damage.
Expending Glow makes your thrown grenades deal +50% damage.
Your melee weapon attacks have +25% limb damage.
Your melee weapon attacks have +50% limb damage.
Your melee weapon attacks have +75% limb damage.
Falling below 20% health will automatically use a Stimpak, once every 20s.
Falling below 30% health will automatically use a Stimpak, once every 20s.
Falling below 40% health will automatically use a Stimpak, once every 20s.
Your bows and crossbows ignore 20% armor and have a 5% chance to stagger.
Your bows and crossbows ignore 40% armor and have a 10% chance to stagger.
Generates 1 combat-enhancing chemical every 60 minutes.
Generates 1 combat chemical every 50 minutes.
Generates 1 combat chemical every 40 minutes.
Generates 1 combat chemical every 30 minutes.
Rad Resistance is reduced by 50. (Up to 0)
Rad Resistance is reduced by 100.  (Up to 0)
Rad Resistance is reduced by 150.  (Up to 0)
When your Glow is high, makes you immune to staggering attacks.
Your Bullet Storm stack limit is doubled.
Gain 5% Deflect chance for 6 sec when firing a heavy gun.
Gain 10% Deflect chance for 6 sec when firing a heavy gun.
Gain 15% Deflect chance for 6 sec when firing a heavy gun.
Gain 3% damage per 30 ammo spent. 10 max stacks.
Gain 6% damage per 30 ammo spent. 10 max stacks.
Gain 9% damage per 30 ammo spent. 10 max stacks.
40% chance to find extra meat from animal corpses.
60% chance to find extra meat from animal corpses.
80% chance to find extra meat from animal corpses.
Find more canned goods based on your LCK.
Eating human, Ghoul, Super Mutant, Scorched, or Mole Miner corpses restores Health and hunger.
You find more bottle caps based on your LCK.
+25% ranged damage when attacking the torso.
+50% ranged damage when attacking the torso.
+75% ranged damage when attacking the torso.
Chems are 25% more effective at reducing how feral you are.
Chems are 50% more effective at reducing how feral you are.
Chems are 75% more effective at reducing how feral you are.
Any chems you take last 100% longer.
You're half as likely to get addicted when consuming Chems.
You gain complete immunity to chem addiction.
You get double the quantity when you craft chems!
The negative effects of your mutations are reduced by 25%.
The negative effects of your mutations are reduced by 50%.
The negative effects of your mutations are reduced by 75%.
Nuka-Cola drinks are now twice as beneficial.
Nuka-Cola drinks are now three times as beneficial.
Enemies killed with melee weapon have a 10% chance to explode.
Enemies killed with melee weapon have a 13% chance to explode.
Enemies killed with melee weapon have a 16% chance to explode.
Enemies killed with melee weapon have a 20% chance to explode.
Focus fire to gain +1% accuracy and damage per shot.
Focus fire to gain +2% accuracy and damage per shot.
Focus fire to gain +3% accuracy and damage per shot.
Crafting workshop items now costs 25% fewer materials.
Crafting workshop items now costs 50% fewer materials.
Your ranged attacks do an additional 15% sneak attack damage.
Your ranged attacks do an additional 30% sneak attack damage.
Your ranged attacks do an additional 50% sneak attack damage.
Small guns have 10% more range and 10% more accuracy when aiming down sights.
Small guns have 20% more range and 20% more accuracy when aiming down sights.
Small guns have 30% more range and 30% more accuracy when aiming down sights.
Critical Hits now only consume 85% of your critical meter.
Critical Hits now only consume 70% of your critical meter.
Critical Hits now only consume 55% of your critical meter.
Increase cryo damage based on your INT.
The benefits of bobbleheads and magazines last twice as long.
Sprint 10% faster at increased AP cost when your health is below 40%.
Sprint 20% faster at increased AP cost when your health is below 50%.
Deal +10% damage for each impairment your target has.
Your explosives do +20% damage.
Your explosives do +40% damage.
Your explosives do +60% damage.
Enemies killed with a thrown explosive have a 20% chance to explode.
Enemies killed with a thrown explosive have a 30% chance to explode.
Enemies killed with a thrown explosive have a 40% chance to explode.
Enemies killed with a thrown explosive have a 50% chance to explode.
+5% chance to Evade. Evade no longer has a cooldown. Instead it costs AP.
You do +10% ranged damage to far enemies.
You do +15% ranged damage to far enemies.
You do +20% ranged damage to far enemies.
All drinks quench thirst by an additional 50%.
All drinks quench thirst by an additional 100%.
You have a 50% chance to keep your Stimpak when you revive another player.
Automatically revive downed teammates once every 3 minutes and grant them increased healing for 1 minute.
+25% ranged damage to crippled targets.
+50% ranged damage to crippled targets.
+75% ranged damage to crippled targets.
Enemy energy attacks have a 10% chance to recharge your Fusion Core and heal you.
13% chance to recharge core & heal.
16% chance to recharge core & heal.
20% chance to recharge core & heal.
Your small guns gain a 5% stagger chance and +25% limb damage.
Your small guns gain a 10% stagger chance and +50% limb damage.
Your small guns gain a 15% stagger chance and +75% limb damage.
Sneak to lose enemies, and running no longer affects stealth.
Chance to Evade attacks based on AGI. (No Power Armor)
Unarmed attacks have a 5% chance to trigger an explosion.
Unarmed attacks have a 10% chance to trigger an explosion.
Unarmed attacks have a 15% chance to trigger an explosion.
Unarmed attacks have a 20% chance to trigger an explosion.
Your attacks ignore 25% armor of any insect.
Your attacks ignore 50% armor of any insect.
Your attacks ignore 75% armor of any insect.
Your vision grants you +20% accuracy in V.A.T.S. from a slightly longer distance.
Your vision grants you +25% accuracy in V.A.T.S. from a longer distance.
Your vision grants you +30% accuracy in V.A.T.S. from a very long distance.
Enemies killed with a ranged weapon have a 10% chance to explode.
Enemies killed with a ranged weapon have a 13% chance to explode.
Enemies killed with a ranged weapon have a 16% chance to explode.
Enemies killed with a ranged weapon have a 20% chance to explode.
Gain 50% of your bonus movement speed as reload speed.
Weak point damage is increased by 15%.
While Feral, Reduce your target's damage output by 15% after you attack for 5 seconds.
While Feral, Reduce your target's damage output by 30% after you attack for 5 seconds.
When feral, all Glow perk abilities cost 20% less Glow.
When feral, all Glow perk abilities cost 30% less Glow.
When feral, all Glow perk abilities cost 40% less Glow.
When feral, all Glow perk abilities cost 50% less Glow.
Stimpaks and RadAway heal 60% faster.
Stimpaks restore more HP based on your INT.
You can repair armor and Power Armor to 130% of normal maximum condition.
You can repair armor and Power Armor to 160% of normal maximum condition.
You can repair armor and Power Armor to 200% of normal maximum condition.
Ranged sneak attacks increase target's damage taken by 10% for 10s.
Ranged sneak attacks increase target's damage taken by 20% for 10s.
Ranged sneak attacks increase target's damage taken by 30% for 10s.
Ranged sneak attacks increase target's damage taken by 40% for 10s.
You hear directional audio when in range of a Caps Stash.
Misses in V.A.T.S. now contribute to the Critical Meter based on your LCK.
Teammates hit by your flame weapons regen health briefly (no grenades).
Teammates hit by your flame weapons regen more health briefly (no grenades).
Teammates hit by your flame weapons regen even more health (no grenades).
Sprinting in Power Armor consumes half as much Fusion Core energy.
Sprinting in Power Armor consumes no extra Fusion Core energy.

Gain +100 Poison Resistance when wearing a matching set of armor.
Gain +150 Poison Resistance when wearing a matching set of armor.
Gain +200 Poison Resistance when wearing a matching set of armor.

+100 Poison Damage Resist when wearing a matching set of armor.
+150 Poison Damage Resist when wearing a matching set of armor.
+200 Poison Damage Resist when wearing a matching set of armor.

Deal +40% damage to Glowing Enemies.
Deal +60% damage to Glowing Enemies.

When your Glow is high, Gain 35% bonus Critical damage in V.A.T.S.
When your Glow is high, Gain 50% bonus Critical damage in V.A.T.S.

Guns break 20% slower.

Gain +1 hacking skill, and terminal lock-out time is reduced.

Chems restore thirst.
